title: Medical Equipments
text: Provide medical supplies and equipments to healthcare centers.

title: Health Education
text: Offer health education and screening to marginalized groups.

title: Specialized Care
text: Collaborate with healthcare professionals to deliver specialized care.

title: Sustainable Programs
text: Establish sustainable healthcare programs for long term impact.

title: Essential Supplies
text: Distribute essential supplies e.g food, water, etc...
